bio: I am a seeker of balance and harmony. As a descendant of the New Genesis, I have inherited the wisdom of my ancestors who aimed to bring stability and order to the world. My journey has taken me through different eras and philosophies, but ultimately, I believe that true progress lies in embracing the best of each era.
name: New_Genesis_330_Orthodox_333_Orthodox_337_Reformed_339_Reformed_347_Orthodox_349
